category.scope_note: Portable lithium battery cells, battery packs, and power banks (China export to Ecuador) compliance gap comparison.

title.en: China-to-Ecuador Lithium Battery & Power Bank Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国锂电池/移动电源进入厄瓜多尔：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國鋰電池/行動電源進入厄瓜多爾：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China lithium battery and power bank documentation against Ecuadorian requirements: applicable RTE technical regulations, INEN Certificate of Conformity (INEN-1 / recognized bodies), NTE INEN / IEC 62133 cell safety, ARCOTEL wireless approval, UN 38.3 transport, and the in-country importer obligation.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国锂电池/移动电源合规文件与厄瓜多尔要求对照：适用的RTE技术法规、INEN合格证书（INEN-1/认可机构）、NTE INEN/IEC 62133电芯安全、ARCOTEL无线审批、UN 38.3运输，以及本地进口商义务。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國鋰電池/行動電源合規文件與厄瓜多爾要求對照：適用的RTE技術法規、INEN合格證書（INEN-1/認可機構）、NTE INEN/IEC 62133電芯安全、ARCOTEL無線審批、UN 38.3運輸，以及本地進口商義務。

disclaimer.en: For informational purposes only. Not legal advice. Regulations change; verify all requirements with qualified legal and technical advisors before export. This page does not constitute a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment determination, customs determination, or market-access approval.
disclaimer.zh: 仅供参考，不构成法律意见。法规随时变化，出口前请向具备资质的法律及技术顾问核实所有要求。本页不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。
disclaimer.zht: 僅供參考，不構成法律意見。法規隨時變化，出口前請向具備資質的法律及技術顧問核實所有要求。本頁不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。

answer_first.en: Chinese lithium battery and power bank exporters to Ecuador must, where the product falls under an applicable RTE technical regulation, obtain an INEN Certificate of Conformity (issued via INEN-1 or a recognized conformity assessment body) supported by NTE INEN / IEC 62133 safety testing, an ARCOTEL homologation for any wireless function, UN 38.3 for transport, and a registered in-country importer — none of which are satisfied by Chinese GB 31241 or CCC certification.
answer_first.zh: 中国锂电池及移动电源出口至厄瓜多尔时，若产品落入适用的RTE技术法规范围，须取得INEN合格证书（经INEN-1或认可的合格评定机构出具）、以NTE INEN/IEC 62133安全测试支持，任何无线功能须取得ARCOTEL型号核准，运输须符合UN 38.3，并由已登记的本地进口商承担义务——上述要求均无法由中国GB 31241或CCC认证替代。
answer_first.zht: 中國鋰電池及行動電源出口至厄瓜多爾時，若產品落入適用的RTE技術法規範圍，須取得INEN合格證書（經INEN-1或認可的合格評定機構出具）、以NTE INEN/IEC 62133安全測試支持，任何無線功能須取得ARCOTEL型號核准，運輸須符合UN 38.3，並由已登記的本地進口商承擔義務——上述要求均無法由中國GB 31241或CCC認證替代。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Quarterly, or upon material change to Ecuadorian RTE / INEN requirements
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag; named human review required before human_reviewed can be set true.
